title: DNA Isolation from Formalin-Fixed, Paraffin-Embedded Material
author: Hendrik F HFvE Van Essen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.zjwf4pe

steps.title: Cut 3 µm (1x), 10 µm...
steps.instruction: Cut 3 µm (1x), 10 µm (2-3x, or more if needed depending on tumour area)

steps.title: Mount all the section on slides with BSA 0
steps.instruction: Mount all the section on slides with BSA 0.1%, and dry them o/n at 37°C (to a maximum of one week)

steps.title: Place slides in xylene 00:07:00, 3 times
steps.instruction: Place slides in xylene 00:07:00, 3 times

steps.title: Hydrate by passing sequentially through 100%,...
steps.instruction: Hydrate by passing sequentially through 100%, 96%, 70% EtOH, and distilled-water

steps.title: Wash with running tap water 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Wash with running tap water 00:05:00

steps.title: Stain slides with eosin 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Stain slides with eosin 00:02:00

steps.title: Wash quickly in water
steps.instruction: Wash quickly in water

steps.title: Dehydrate by passing sequentially through 70%, 96%, 100% EtOH, xylene
steps.instruction: Dehydrate by passing sequentially through 70%, 96%, 100% EtOH, xylene

steps.title: Remove slides from xylene and use...
steps.instruction: Remove slides from xylene and use DePex to mount a covering glass.

steps.title: Let the 3 µm H&E slide...
steps.instruction: Let the 3 µm H&E slide be judged by the pathologist for dissection. Mark the tumor area and tumor percentage

steps.title: Stain slides with haematoxylin 00:02:00 (if...
steps.instruction: Stain slides with haematoxylin 00:02:00 (if solution is not fresh staining time can be extended, max 4 min.)

steps.title: Place slides in xylene 3 x 7 min
steps.instruction: Place slides in xylene 3 x 7 min. 00:07:00, 3 times

steps.title: Hydrate by passing sequentially through 100%,...
steps.instruction: Hydrate by passing sequentially through 100%, 96%, 70% EtOH, and water

steps.title: Stain slides with haematoxylin 1-2 min
steps.instruction: Stain slides with haematoxylin 1-2 min. 00:02:00 (if solution is not fresh staining time can be extended, max 3 min.)

steps.title: Wash with running tap water 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Wash with running tap water 00:05:00

steps.title: Place slides in distilled water
steps.instruction: Place slides in distilled water

steps.title: Dissect the tissue from the slides...
steps.instruction: Dissect the tissue from the slides (when they are still slightly wet) with a scalpel or a needle

steps.title: Place the material in a clean safelock eppendorf cup
steps.instruction: Place the material in a clean safelock eppendorf cup

steps.title: Spin down in a centrifuge at...
steps.instruction: Spin down in a centrifuge at full speed and get rid of the water layer 00:05:00

steps.title: Shake and invert samples (do not vortex)
steps.instruction: Shake and invert samples (do not vortex).

steps.title: Add 160 µl ATL buffer Buffer ATL Qiagen Catalog #19076
steps.instruction: Add 160 µl ATL buffer Buffer ATL Qiagen Catalog #19076

steps.title: Add 40 µl prot K (20...
steps.instruction: Add 40 µl prot K (20 mg/mL) Proteinase K Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #EO0491

steps.title: vortex sample 00:00:15 Make sure all...
steps.instruction: vortex sample 00:00:15 Make sure all tissue is in the liquid

steps.title: Incubate o/n at 56°C in heat-block...
steps.instruction: Incubate o/n at 56°C in heat-block or waterbath and vortex regularly! 08:00:00 56 °C Check if all tissue is digested

steps.title: Vortex samples and spin down
steps.instruction: Vortex samples and spin down

steps.title: Incubate at 98°C 10 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at 98°C 10 min. 98 °C 00:10:00

steps.title: Spin down at 16600 rcf
steps.instruction: Spin down at 16600 rcf.1 min. 00:01:00

steps.title: Add 200 µl AL buffer and mixvery well by vortexing
steps.instruction: Add 200 µl AL buffer and mixvery well by vortexing! Buffer AL, Lysis buffer Qiagen Catalog #19076

steps.title: Add 200 µl Ethanol 100% and...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µl Ethanol 100% and mix very well by vortexing! EtOH Contributed by users

steps.title: Incubate at RT 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at RT 00:05:00

steps.title: Spin down the eppendorf cups at full speed1 min
steps.instruction: Spin down the eppendorf cups at full speed1 min.

steps.title: Transfer up to 600 µl lysate...
steps.instruction: Transfer up to 600 µl lysate to the QIAamp MinElute Column.

steps.title: Spin down at 8
steps.instruction: Spin down at 8.000 rpm 00:01:00

steps.title: Place the QIA Column in a...
steps.instruction: Place the QIA Column in a clean 2 ml collection tube, discard the flow-through make sure the column tip is clear of droplets

steps.title: Add 500 µl AW1 buffer to...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µl AW1 buffer to the column Buffer AW1 Qiagen Catalog #19081

steps.title: Spin down for at 8
steps.instruction: Spin down for at 8.000 rpm and place the column in a new tube 00:01:00

steps.title: Add 500 µl AW2 buffer (QIAmp...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µl AW2 buffer (QIAmp micro-kit) to the column Buffer AW2 Qiagen Catalog #19072

steps.title: Spin down at 8
steps.instruction: Spin down at 8.000 rpm and place the column in a new tube 00:01:00

steps.title: Spin down at full speed to dry the membrane 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Spin down at full speed to dry the membrane 00:03:00

steps.title: Place the QI column in a...
steps.instruction: Place the QI column in a properly marked eppendorf cup, discard collection tube

steps.title: Add 20 to 50 µl (depending...
steps.instruction: Add 20 to 50 µl (depending on sample size) of AE buffer to the column and incubate. 00:05:00 20 °C, room temperature Buffer AE Qiagen Catalog #19077

steps.title: Spin down at full speed
steps.instruction: Spin down at full speed. 00:03:00

steps.title: Throw away the column, close the...
steps.instruction: Throw away the column, close the eppendorf cup and store the DNA at 4 °C
